title: cardamomum pallidum
intro: Cardamomum pallidum, also known as white cardamom, is a plant species in the ginger family (Zingiberaceae) that is native to Southeast Asia. The medicinal properties of Cardamomum pallidum are attributed to its essential oils, which contain compounds like limonene and terpinen-4-ol, exhibiting anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Cardamomum pallidum include relief from digestive issues, colds, and respiratory problems, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve oral health. Cardamomum pallidum can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, decoctions, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
